driver_subject: dmaengine: sf-pdma: Annotate struct sf_pdma with __counted_by
stage1_reason: Both commits adapt to kernel API changes: 1) __counted_by attribute for flexible array bounds checking, 2) platform driver remove callback returning void (remove_new).
stage2_reason: Driver commit 1539a22e1441 adds __counted_by annotation to struct sf_pdma, directly matching the kernel commit dd06e72e68bc that introduced the __counted_by macro for flexible array bounds checking. The timing (kernel commit in v6.5, driver migration in v6.6->v6.7) and specific keyword match indicate a clear causal relationship for this API adoption.
